name: maung-tools
description: Maung Htike's catalog of agentic plugins, for the OpenAI Codex CLI.

plugins.name: maungs-agentic-toolbelt
plugins.description: A project-agnostic, human-gated multi-agent software-development pipeline, ported to the OpenAI Codex CLI: skills via this marketplace, agents + hooks via install-codex.sh. Plan -> build -> review -> wrap-up, plus bug diagnosis, code translation, chores, handoffs, and a self-maintaining codebase wiki.
